title: leymus × buriaticus
intro: Leymus × buriaticus, also known as Buriatic Wheat Grass, is a hybrid species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Leymus × buriaticus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Leymus × buriaticus can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
